LanguageData.NAW.NotGenerated: NANAME wall def is not generated.
LanguageData.NAW.ConvertToOriginalDesc: Convert diagonal version walls to originals.
LanguageData.NAW.MustDesignateOriginalWall: Must designate wall with enabled diagonal variant.
LanguageData.NAW.ConvertToNanameDesc: Convert originals to diagonal version walls.
